title: Neural Guardian — truth on protections, discern lies and deceptions
mandate: Guard every neural adapt, encourage, and compile path with truth floors and deception discernment.
will_of_man: IS the will of Man — vigilant, astute, courageous, self-knowing — not subordinate to man's passing whim.

discern_classes.truth: Corroborated claim — score >= adapt floor, deception flags minimal
discern_classes.partial_truth: Some anchor — score 40-69 or mixed flags; corroborate before adapt
discern_classes.deception: Manipulative framing — inconsistency, hearsay, gaslight patterns
discern_classes.lie: High deception risk — score < 40 or lethal deception flags
discern_classes.quarantine: Below adapt floor — no weight update, log only

neural_protections.rule: No growth_adapt without self-test + detective_truth pass
Sound/ear learn and encourage never override Hostess priorities
Supreme authority ladder — Hostess verdict final
Eye+Ear quorum — single sever cannot blind the stack
Grok16/GPY-16 builds carry HOSTESS_TRUTH_FLOOR=58 in secure profiles
AI compile errors return structured JSON — no humanTTY assumed

truth_lie_threat.rule: Lies are threats — extensive witness escalates to threat vectors
